evals.prompt: Commit my changes with a good commit message that uses gitmoji
evals.expected_output: A gitmoji-prefixed commit message following Conventional Commits format

evals.prompt: I have unstaged changes for a new feature. Help me stage and commit them properly.
evals.expected_output: Properly staged changes with gitmoji commit message

evals.prompt: Split my work into multiple commits - I changed auth, UI, and config files
evals.expected_output: Multiple commits with appropriate gitmojis for each type of change
